name: @block-agent/server
description: SessionProtocol v0 host: wraps ONE LaunchedAgent (from @block-agent/cli launch()) and speaks the protocol over two transports — an in-process transport (direct calls + subscriptions, behavior-preserving vs cli_channel/context_view) and a WebSocket transport (ws). `ws` lives ONLY here, like Letta lives only in app-memory_letta — core stays zero-runtime-dependency. Design: ai_com/design/multi-terminal-and-web-inspector.md (D3) §3 + session-protocol-v0.md (D2).
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/server/*.js'.
